title: Error retrieving Webflow CMS collection list
symptom: When attempting to retrieve the collection list from the Webflow CMS using the REST API, the error 'Cannot read properties of null (reading 'reduce')' occurs. This does not happen when using Postman.
applies_when: Using Webflow API to retrieve collection list
Headers or query strings were previously bound and then unbound
not_this_if: Using Postman to retrieve the same data without issues
root_cause: The error occurs due to a conflict in the API integration when headers or query strings are bound and then unbound. This can lead to the API call attempting to access properties of a null object, resulting in the error message.
fix_steps: Re-create the collection in the Webflow API integration
Avoid clicking on the plug icon to bind headers or query strings during setup
agent_instruction: Re-create the Webflow collection without binding headers or query strings.
